full_text:
Heatwave continues in Nagpur; Temperature at 43.8 degrees Celsius
The intensity of the sun is being felt more, causing discomfort to citizens. The heat has left the residents distressed. The scorching heat is increasing day by day. The sun feels more intense during the afternoon. There is a possibility of temperature rising further in some areas. The heatwave has also intensified in rural areas. Due to a significant rise in temperature, people are starting to experience the effects of the heat.
In some places, a heatwave is being observed while in others, rain is falling. Reports indicate warnings of strong winds and heavy rain in some areas, while in others, a rise in temperature is expected. In Nagpur, the heatwave continues with a maximum temperature of 43.8 degrees Celsius recorded on Sunday. The temperature had dropped to 40 degrees in the last two days, but it is now rising again.
In other cities of Vidarbha, the temperature has also increased, with Brahmapuri recording the highest temperature of 45.2 degrees Celsius. Citizens are enduring more discomfort due to the heat. Additionally, the Meteorological Department has forecasted thunderstorms, strong winds, and light rain on June 10 and 11.
heat wave
Short Summary
Heatwave in Nagpur; Maximum temperature recorded at 43.8°C on Sunday.
The temperature had dropped to 40°C in the last two days, but it has risen again.
Heat has also increased in other cities of Vidarbha; Brahmapuri at 45.2°C.
The Meteorological Department has predicted thunderstorms, strong winds, and light rain on June 10 and 11.
